title: Silent Updated
description: Updated textures for Silent Gear, Silent's Gems, and Productive Metalworks to match Jappa's art style
body:
This resource pack updates textures from Minecraft mods to better match Jappa's vanilla art style, aiming for improved visual consistency with modern Minecraft textures.

You may need at least one of these mods:

🔗 [Silent Gear](https://modrinth.com/mod/silent-gear)

🔗 [Silent's Gems](https://modrinth.com/mod/silents-gems)

🔗 [Productive Metalworks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/productive-metalworks)

🔗 [Silent Gear Metalworks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/silent-gear-metalworks)

This pack includes new textures for:
- Most of tool parts
- Ingots, gems and other crafting ingredients
- Metal blocks

⚠️ Some textures are still missing or may be placeholders until future updates. I still plan to update all the machine block models, Silent's gems and Productive Metalworks building block variants.
